destination_taxonomy.archive/native_2026-07-01/: historical/superseded artifacts explicitly descended from the f766478 native operator
destination_taxonomy.archive/post_2026-07-01/: post-July MIXED or operator-OPEN historical artifacts, partitioned by owner/family
destination_taxonomy.archive/pre_2026-07-01/: only PRE_NATIVE with explicit path-specific operator lineage predating f766478
destination_taxonomy.research/<lane>/: ACTIVE artifacts only after dependency-closed migration authority

forbidden_inference: No prefix, including cascade_, may establish PRE_NATIVE or any destination.
readout_rule: A standard-theory comparison/readout does not demote a native operator unless it feeds the tested action, variation, EOM, coupling, or load-bearing derivation.

rules_in_precedence_order.effect: retain immutable path; do not infer operator provenance
classify from operator-bearing commits and primary records
MIXED only when imported structure enters the tested functional/action, variation, EOM, coupling, or load-bearing derivation
retain native operator provenance and require explicit comparison_readout plus role=REFERENCE_ONLY
OPEN; filename and dates may not promote or demote
classify independently from current controls/result status
evaluate dependencies and immutable constraints independently
